title: Rich Filo Plantain Wrap
description: A rich and silky filo pastry wrap filled with tender plantains, perfect for a sick-day meal that's both comforting and delicious.

ingredients.name: Cream Cheese
ingredients.notes: creamy and rich, can be vegan if needed

ingredients.name: Sugar Syrup (for coating plantains)
ingredients.notes: can use maple syrup or honey

ingredients.name: Nutritional Yeast (optional, for a cheesy flavor)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add sliced plantains and cook until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes per side. Remove from heat.
To prepare the filo wrap filling: Mix cream cheese with a pinch of salt, if using nutritional yeast for extra cheesy flavor.

In an oven-safe dish or baking sheet, place a filo pastry sheet on its perforated half-circle shape. Spread a layer of cream cheese mixture over one side of the filo sheet. Top it evenly with sliced plantain, drizzled lightly with sugar syrup if using.
Fold another filo sheet over to encase the filling completely. Press edges firmly to seal.
Place wrapped filo wraps on a baking sheet and brush top with olive oil. Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crisp.
Serve hot as a rich, silky, sick-day American dish.
